condition_summary: G01 through G11 point-table gates must pass before segment comparison outputs are publishable
segment_source class must be in allowed source-class vocabulary
segment_type must be within controlled vocabulary zfc fcc fcw increasing_T decreasing_T constant_T unknown
segment_direction must be present and within increasing_T decreasing_T constant_T unknown
Protocol labels zfc fcc fcw require metadata/header or curated registry evidence
segment_type unknown must not be treated as zfc fcc fcw in comparisons
Overlap fraction between compared segment supports must meet declared threshold
Overlap-point count must meet declared minimum threshold
Compared segments must share same or policy-defined compatible H_Oe scope
Compared segments must be from same sample/file context or explicit approved pairing policy
Comparison method and binning/interpolation treatment must be declared in provenance
Interpolation/regridding is blocked unless separate policy approval is referenced
Unknown segments may be used for coverage diagnostics only
Comparison outputs must be labeled candidate diagnostic and blocked from hysteresis or irreversibility physics claims
